'''''Vibroblade''''' was a [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]] that operated as part of the [[Khuiumin Survivors]]' [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces. It was used to board [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liners]] and other larger [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] that had been targeted for plunder.

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the ''Vibroblade'', along with [[Rock Squadron]], participated in a raid on the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Galaxy Chance]]'', the objective of which was to capture the former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Zlece Oonaar]], who had commanded one of the two [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] that had carried out the original [[Battle of Khuiumin|Bastiv massacre]]. After the ''Chance''{{'s}} weaponry had been neutralized, the Blastboat docked with the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]], allowing [[Jacob Nive]] and other Survivors to board the vessel to deal with Oonaar.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
